landing.hero_subtitle: Automate your sales, reminders and collections with smart AI agents. Built for African businesses that want to grow.

landing.feature_sell_desc: Qualify your prospects and convert 24/7 with a professional AI sales agent.
landing.feature_remind_desc: Manage your appointments with automatic reminders and smart confirmations.
landing.feature_collect_desc: Negotiate payment plans and maintain good customer relationships.
landing.feature_broadcast_desc: Send targeted messages to your customer segments in one click.

landing.how_step2_desc: Choose the module and customize the AI behavior
landing.how_step3_desc: Your agent works 24/7 while you focus on what matters

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_text: At WAZA (operated by Massudom Silicon Valley), we take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect your information when you use our WhatsApp AI agent platform.
privacy.s2_i1: Registration data: name, email address, password (encrypted), company
privacy.s2_i2: WhatsApp data: contact phone numbers, messages exchanged via your AI agents
privacy.s2_i3: Usage data: login logs, agent usage statistics, analytics
privacy.s2_i4: Payment data: processed securely via our partners (Stripe, CinetPay, Flutterwave)
privacy.s3_i1: Provide and improve our WhatsApp AI agent services
privacy.s3_i3: Generate personalized AI responses for your customers
privacy.s3_i5: Contact you for support and important updates
privacy.s4_text: WAZA uses AI models (Claude by Anthropic) to generate your agent responses. Conversations are processed in real time and are not used to train third-party models. You retain ownership of your conversational data.
privacy.s5_text: We use industry-standard security measures: SSL/TLS encryption, password hashing (bcrypt), secure JWT tokens, and hosting on certified infrastructure (Railway, Vercel).
privacy.s6_intro: We never sell your data. It may only be shared with:
privacy.s6_i1: Our technical service providers (hosting, AI, payment)
privacy.s6_i2: Competent authorities if required by law
privacy.s7_intro: In accordance with applicable regulations, you have the right to:
privacy.s7_i4: Withdraw your consent at any time
privacy.s7_contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at
privacy.s8_text: For any questions regarding this policy, contact our Data Protection Officer:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_text: By accessing and using the WAZA platform, you agree to be bound by these terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use our services.
terms.s2_intro: WAZA is a SaaS platform that allows businesses to deploy AI conversational agents on WhatsApp. Services include:
terms.s2_i1: Creation and configuration of AI agents (sales, reminders, collections, broadcast)
terms.s2_i2: Management of WhatsApp contacts and conversations
terms.s3_text: To use WAZA, you must create an account with accurate and up-to-date information. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your login credentials and all activities performed under your account.
terms.s4_intro: WAZA offers several pricing plans (Free, Starter, Pro, Business). Prices are displayed in FCFA and may be changed with 30 days' notice. Payments are processed via Stripe, CinetPay or Flutterwave as you prefer.
terms.s4_i2: You can cancel at any time, effective at the end of the current period
terms.s4_i3: Exceeding message limits results in temporary service suspension
terms.s5_i1: Use WAZA to send spam or unsolicited messages
terms.s5_i2: Violate WhatsApp Business terms of service
terms.s5_i3: Use AI agents for illegal or fraudulent activities
terms.s5_i4: Attempt to bypass your subscription plan limits
terms.s5_i5: Share your login credentials with third parties
terms.s6_text: WAZA and its source code, design, and content are the property of Massudom Silicon Valley. You retain ownership of your data, contacts, and message content. AI-generated responses are considered content created for your account.
terms.s7_text: WAZA is provided "as is". We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free. Our total liability is limited to the amount you have paid for the service in the past 12 months.
terms.s8_text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account in case of violation of these terms. You may terminate your account at any time from your dashboard settings.
terms.s9_text: These terms are governed by the laws of Cameroon. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of Bandjoun, Cameroon.
terms.s10_text: For any questions regarding these terms:

about.title: About WAZA
about.intro: WAZA was born from a simple observation: African businesses communicate massively via WhatsApp, but lack the tools to automate and optimize these exchanges. We created the first WhatsApp AI agent platform designed for Africa.
about.mission_text: Democratizing access to artificial intelligence for African businesses. With WAZA, every SME can deploy a sales agent, a reminders assistant, or an intelligent collection tool on WhatsApp — in just a few minutes, without any technical skills required.
about.value_local_desc: We build tools designed for the realities and needs of African businesses.
about.value_innovation_desc: We leverage the latest advances in artificial intelligence to create high-performance conversational agents.
about.value_accessibility_desc: Pricing adapted to the African market, from the free plan to the enterprise plan.
about.value_vision_desc: We aim to connect businesses across the continent with their customers via WhatsApp.
about.team_text: WAZA is developed by Massudom Silicon Valley, a tech startup based in Bandjoun, Cameroon. Our team combines expertise in AI, software development and deep knowledge of the African market.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Have a question? A project? Our team is here to help you automate your WhatsApp communication.
contact.form_success: Message sent! We will reply within 24 hours.
